\tzpentry{ID4923}{Potential Energy Tensor Coupling}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4923 introduces Potential Energy Tensor Coupling as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathcal{U}_{\text{tri}} = \exp\left(-i \frac{\pi}{8} \sigma_z^{(1)} \otimes \sigma_z^{(2)} \otimes \sigma_z^{(3)}\right) \end{equation}
